claimant_lives_in_uk: Whether the claimant lives in the UK.
children: A list of children the claimant is claiming for.
lives_with_claimant: Whether the child lives with the claimant.
in_approved_education: Whether the child is in approved education or training (e.g. A-levels, GCSEs, NVQ up to level 3). Only relevant for children aged 16-19.
in_extension_period: Whether the child (aged 16 or 17) has left education and registered with a government-sponsored careers service or the armed forces (qualifying for a 20-week extension).
upkeep_per_week: The amount in £ per week the claimant contributes towards the child's upkeep (food, clothes, pocket money, etc.). Only relevant if the child does not live with the claimant.
another_claimant_has_priority: Whether another person who also lives with the child has priority for claiming Child Benefit.
another_claimant_lives_with_child: Whether someone who lives with the child is already claiming Child Benefit for them.
care_weeks: The number of weeks the child has been in local authority care.
care_home_24h_per_week: Whether the child spends at least 24 hours per week at home while in local authority care.
hospital_weeks: The number of weeks the child has been in hospital or residential accommodation.
claimant_spends_on_child: Whether the claimant regularly spends money on the child (e.g. food, clothes, books) while the child is in hospital or residential accommodation.
is_fostered: Whether the child is fostered by the claimant.
council_pays_for_child: Whether the local council pays towards the child's accommodation or maintenance.
works_24_plus_hours: Whether the child works 24 or more hours per week in paid employment.
started_apprenticeship_in_england: Whether the child has started an apprenticeship in England.
receives_qualifying_benefits: Whether the child receives qualifying benefits in their own right, such as Universal Credit or Employment and Support Allowance.
